$description: Tracks which code branches are exercised by fixtures and tested in JAX / TS ports. Fixture coverage is computed and enforced by scripts/verify_branch_coverage.py.

branches.condition: c4 boolean selects C4 vs C3 polynomial
branches.notes: Separate fixture keys ftemp_kphio_c3 and ftemp_kphio_c4 exercise both sides.

branches.condition: ftemp_kphio < 0 -> clamp result to 0
branches.notes: Fixtures hit the clamp on C4 tc=-10 and tc=0, and leave it unclamped elsewhere.

branches.condition: root = b^2 - 4ac < 0
branches.else_behavior: discriminant is non-negative and root solving proceeds normally
branches.notes: Near-zero negative discriminant case (a=1,b=1,c=nearest(0.25,1.0)) triggers the tolerance clamp. Existing cases cover non-negative discriminants.

branches.condition: inside the negative-discriminant guard, -root < 3*epsilon(b)
branches.else_behavior: fall through to the impossible_discriminant arm
branches.notes: True side now exercised by the near-zero negative discriminant fixture. False side leads to impossible_discriminant (undefined r1).

waiver.reason: The false (else) side of this branch falls through to the impossible_discriminant arm which returns with r1 uninitialized.
waiver.stabilization_plan: Only cover the else side after the upstream Fortran impossible_discriminant arm is hardened to return a defined value.

branches.condition: inside the negative-discriminant guard, the near-zero tolerance check fails and the routine returns early
branches.else_behavior: the near-zero tolerance branch zeroes the discriminant and continues
branches.notes: The else side of near_zero_discriminant falls into this arm. The outer negative-discriminant guard is now entered by the near-zero fixture (case 9), but that case takes the near_zero_discriminant true branch and never reaches this arm. Covering this arm would validate undefined state (r1 uninitialized).

waiver.reason: The early-return impossible-discriminant arm returns with r1 uninitialized, so forcing a fixture here would validate undefined state rather than a stable contract.
waiver.stabilization_plan: Only cover this branch after upstream Fortran is hardened or the harness wraps it with explicit defined-state behavior.

branches.condition: a == 0 and the quadratic degenerates to a linear or constant equation
branches.notes: Fixtures include both a==0 and a!=0 cases.

branches.condition: within the linear fallback, b == 0 and r1 is forced to 0
branches.else_behavior: within the linear fallback, solve r1 = -c/b
branches.notes: Fixtures include both a==0,b==0 and a==0,b!=0 cases.

branches.condition: opt_hypothesis == 'PM'
branches.notes: Fixtures now include both PM baseline cases and an LC optimization case.

branches.condition: do_optim=.TRUE. and the result is negated for the minimizer
branches.notes: Fixtures include both the normal profit return and the negated optimizer-facing return.

branches.condition: watsat - vol_ice < 0.01 and effective porosity is clamped to 0.01
branches.notes: Fixtures include both the standard soil parameters and a low-porosity clamp trigger case.

branches.condition: watsat - vol_ice < 0.01 and effective porosity is clamped to 0.01
branches.notes: Fixtures include both the standard soil parameters and a low-porosity clamp trigger case.

branches.condition: zground > 0.1*hc and ground height is capped
branches.notes: Fixtures now include an explicit high-zground canopy case that triggers the 10% height cap.

branches.condition: zg1/hc > 1.0 and normalized ground height is capped at 1.0
branches.notes: Given the preceding zg1=min(zground,0.1*hc), the cap cannot trigger under the current implementation.

waiver.reason: This branch is effectively dead behind the earlier ground-height cap and is explicitly waived until the upstream logic changes or the branch is removed.
waiver.evidence: The preceding assignment zg1=min(zground,0.1*hc) implies zg1/hc <= 0.1, so the later min(zg1/hc,1.0) clamp cannot take its capped side.

branches.condition: LAI > eps and boundary-layer resistance is computed
branches.notes: Fixtures include LAI=0 and positive-LAI cases.

branches.condition: raw Penman-Monteith result is negative and is floored to 0
branches.notes: Fixtures now include a negative-energy stress case that is floored to zero alongside standard positive-LE cases.

branches.condition: met_ind < 1 and the routine stops with a fatal error
branches.notes: The invalid-index arm is intentionally unexercised because it would abort the program.

waiver.reason: The fatal-stop guard is intentionally waived until the harness has a safe error-path test strategy.
waiver.safe_test_strategy: Exercise this path only through an isolated subprocess or error-capturing harness mode so the full fixture generator does not abort.

branches.condition: met_ind == 1 and the rolling state is initialized from the daily input
branches.else_behavior: apply exponential smoothing to the existing rolling state
branches.notes: Fixtures include both the initialization and smoothing paths.

branches.condition: SWE > eps -> no evaporation from floor if snow on ground
branches.notes: Fixtures include SWE=0 (evaporation proceeds) and SWE>0 (evaporation zeroed) cases.

branches.condition: T<=Tmin -> all snow; T>=Tmax -> all rain; between -> mixed
branches.else_behavior: one of the two other precipitation phase arms is taken
branches.notes: Fixtures include all three precipitation regimes: snow (T<=0), mixed (T=0.5), and rain (T>=1).

branches.condition: LAI <= eps -> no canopy evaporation/sublimation
branches.notes: Fixtures include LAI=0 (case 4, no evaporation) and LAI>=1.5 (cases 0-3,5, evaporation computed).

branches.condition: Prec==0 & T<=Tmin -> sublimation; Prec==0 & T>Tmin -> evaporation
branches.else_behavior: no evaporation when precipitation is occurring
branches.notes: Fixtures include sublimation (Pre=0,T<0), evaporation (Pre=0,T>0), and precipitation-suppressed no-evap (Pre>0) cases.

branches.condition: T >= Tmin -> unload excess canopy snow beyond wmax_tot
branches.else_behavior: no unloading when temperature is below Tmin
branches.notes: Fixtures include T>=0 (unloading active, cases 0,2,4,5) and T<0 (no unloading, cases 1,3).

branches.condition: T < Tmin -> snow interception capacity (wmaxsnow); else -> liquid capacity (wmax)
branches.notes: Fixtures include T<0 (snow interception, cases 1,3) and T>=0 (liquid interception, cases 0,2,4,5).

branches.condition: T>=Tmelt -> melt ice; T<Tmelt & swe_l>0 -> freeze liquid; else -> no phase change
branches.else_behavior: no-change arm when T<Tmelt and no liquid snow exists
branches.notes: Fixtures include melt (T=0.5 with existing ice), freeze (T<0 with swe_l>0), and no-change (T<0 with swe_l=0) cases.

branches.condition: totc < 1e-6 -> ntend = 0 (no SOM, skip N dynamics)
branches.notes: Case 7 has totc ≈ 5e-7 (triggers true). Cases 0-6, 8-9 stay in the full nitrogen path.

branches.condition: cstate(5)*nc_h_max > nstate -> nc_h = nstate/totc (unusual inputs)
branches.notes: Case 8 explicitly triggers the unusual branch with cstate(5)=5.0 and nstate=0.4; the baseline cases keep nc_h = nc_h_max.

branches.condition: 0.43 * (nc_som / nc_mb) ** 0.6 > 1.0 -> cap raw CUE at 1.0
branches.else_behavior: leave raw CUE unchanged before the lower-floor check
branches.notes: The baseline fixtures stay below the upper cap. Forcing the true arm makes cue = 1.0, so the upstream formula divides by zero in cupt_awen = (resp - decomp_h) / (1.0 - cue).

waiver.reason: The true arm feeds a zero denominator into the upstream nitrogen update, producing non-finite output rather than a stable numerical contract.
waiver.safe_test_strategy: Keep the branch tagged and explicitly uncovered until the reference implementation defines a non-fatal behavior for cue = 1.0.

branches.condition: min(raw_cue, 1.0) < cue_min -> floor CUE at cue_min
branches.notes: Case 9 explicitly drives nc_som low enough to hit the cue_min floor without triggering the unusual humus branch; baseline cases stay above the floor.

branches.condition: 0.43 * (nc_som / nc_mb) ** 0.6 > 1.0 -> cap raw CUE at 1.0 in steadystate iteration
branches.else_behavior: leave raw CUE unchanged before the lower-floor check
branches.notes: Same CUE clamp math as decompose. Fixtures stay below the upper cap.

waiver.reason: The true arm feeds cue=1.0 into cupt_awen = (resp - decomp_h) / (1.0 - cue), producing a zero denominator and non-finite output.
waiver.safe_test_strategy: Keep tagged and uncovered until the reference implementation defines non-fatal behavior for cue = 1.0.

branches.condition: min(raw_cue, 1.0) < cue_min -> floor CUE at cue_min in steadystate iteration
branches.notes: With cn_input=25, the N:C ratio stays above the cue_min threshold across all fixture cases. Only extremely low nitrogen inputs can trigger the floor.

waiver.reason: Typical parameterizations with cn_input=25 produce CUE values in the 0.3-0.5 range, well above cue_min=0.1. Additional fixture cases with extremely high cn_input would be needed.
waiver.next_action: Add a fixture with cn_input >> 100 to drive nc_som low enough to trigger the floor.

branches.condition: fract_root_input < 0 or fract_root_input > 1 -> error stop
branches.notes: All fixture cases use fract_root_input in [0, 0.3, 0.5, 1.0] (valid range). JAX keeps initialize_totc pure for jit/grad and covers the fatal-path guard through initialize_totc_checked; TS validates at the exported entry point.

waiver.reason: The true arm is an error stop that terminates the Fortran program, so fixtures cannot cover it. The JAX port preserves it in a checked host wrapper while keeping initialize_totc callback-free for pure JAX workflows; TS preserves it at the exported entry point.
waiver.safe_test_strategy: Exercise the port-side guard with dedicated invalid-input tests while keeping fixture playback on valid Fortran cases and leaving the pure JAX kernel free of host callbacks.

branches.condition: fract_legacy_soc < 0 or fract_legacy_soc > 1 -> error stop
branches.notes: All fixture cases use fract_legacy_soc in [0, 0.5, 1.0] (valid range). JAX keeps initialize_totc pure for jit/grad and covers the fatal-path guard through initialize_totc_checked; TS validates at the exported entry point.

waiver.reason: The true arm is an error stop that terminates the Fortran program, so fixtures cannot cover it. The JAX port preserves it in a checked host wrapper while keeping initialize_totc callback-free for pure JAX workflows; TS preserves it at the exported entry point.
waiver.safe_test_strategy: Exercise the port-side guard with dedicated invalid-input tests while keeping fixture playback on valid Fortran cases and leaving the pure JAX kernel free of host callbacks.

branches.condition: pheno_stage == 1 -> growth phase with allocation & turnover
branches.else_behavior: pheno_dormancy: zero pools, dump to litter, reset to growth
branches.notes: True: cases with pheno=1. False: pheno=2 dormancy case.

branches.condition: pft_type=="oat" -> nonzero grain growth respiration
branches.else_behavior: grain_resp_zero: grain respiration forced to zero
branches.notes: True: oat cases. False: grass cases.

branches.condition: pft_type!="oat" -> grain respiration forced to zero
branches.notes: Else branch of grain_resp_oat. Both sides exercised.

branches.condition: invert_option==0 -> compute litter_cleaf from leaf turnover
branches.else_behavior: litter_cleaf passed through from input (inversion mode)
branches.notes: True: inv=0 cases. False: inv=1 and inv=2 cases.

branches.condition: invert_option==0 -> update cleaf from carbon allocation
branches.notes: True: inv=0. False: inv=1,2. Same pair as litter_from_turnover.

branches.condition: pft_type=="oat" -> update grain carbon pool
branches.else_behavior: cgrain_zero: grain carbon forced to zero
branches.notes: True: oat cases. False: grass cases.

branches.condition: pft_type!="oat" -> grain carbon forced to zero
branches.else_behavior: cgrain_update_oat: update grain pool from grain_fill
branches.notes: Else branch of cgrain_update_oat.

branches.condition: management_type==1 -> harvest event
branches.notes: True: harvest cases (grass and oat). False: all other mgmt types.

branches.condition: pft_type=="grass" -> harvest grass (reduce leaf+stem proportionally)
branches.notes: True: harvest grass. False: harvest oat.

branches.condition: invert_option==0 -> reduce cleaf during harvest
branches.notes: True: harvest grass inv=0. False: harvest grass inv=1 case.

branches.condition: pft_type=="oat" -> harvest oat (reset all carbon pools)
branches.notes: True: harvest oat case. False: harvest grass cases.

branches.condition: management_type==3 -> grazing event
branches.notes: True: grazing grass, grazing oat. False: all other mgmt types.

branches.condition: invert_option==0 -> reduce cleaf during grazing
branches.notes: True: grazing grass inv=0. False: grazing grass inv=1 fixture case exercises the skipped-cleaf path directly.

branches.condition: management_type==4 -> organic material input
branches.notes: True: organic case. False: no-mgmt cases.

branches.condition: pheno_stage==2 -> dormancy, zero pools, dump to litter
branches.notes: True: pheno=2 case. False: all pheno=1 cases. Paired with pheno_growth.

branches.condition: pheno_stage==1 -> active inversion computation
branches.notes: True: all pheno=1 cases. False: pheno=2 dormancy case.

branches.condition: invert_option==1 -> derive cratio_leaf from delta_lai
branches.notes: True: inv=1 cases. False: inv=2 cases.

branches.condition: gpp_day > 0.2e-8 -> sufficient GPP for meaningful cratio_leaf
branches.notes: True: normal GPP cases. False: low GPP case.

branches.condition: management_type==1 -> harvest management term in cratio_leaf
branches.notes: True: option1 harvest grass/oat. False: option1 grazing/no_mgmt.

branches.condition: pft_type=="grass" -> harvest grass management term
branches.else_behavior: option1_harvest_other: no management term for other pft
branches.notes: True: harvest grass. False: harvest oat.

branches.condition: pft_type!="grass" -> no harvest management term
branches.else_behavior: option1_harvest_grass: apply harvest grass management term
branches.notes: True: harvest oat. False: harvest grass.

branches.condition: management_type==3 -> grazing management term in cratio_leaf
branches.else_behavior: option1_no_mgmt or option1_organic: no grazing term
branches.notes: True: option1 grazing grass/oat. False: option1 harvest/no_mgmt.

branches.condition: pft_type=="grass" -> grazing grass management term
branches.else_behavior: option1_grazing_other: no management term for other pft
branches.notes: True: grazing grass. False: grazing oat.

branches.condition: pft_type!="grass" -> no grazing management term
branches.else_behavior: option1_grazing_grass: apply grazing grass management term
branches.notes: True: grazing oat. False: grazing grass.

branches.condition: management_type not 1 or 3 -> no management term in cratio_leaf
branches.else_behavior: harvest or grazing management term applied
branches.notes: True: no-mgmt and organic cases. False: harvest/grazing cases.

branches.condition: invert_option==2 -> derive turnover_cleaf from delta_lai
branches.notes: True: inv=2 cases. False: inv=1 cases.

branches.condition: cleaf > 0.00001 -> sufficient cleaf for inversion
branches.notes: True: normal cleaf cases. False: low-cleaf threshold case.

branches.condition: management_type==1 -> harvest management term in turnover_cleaf
branches.notes: True: option2 harvest grass/oat. False: option2 grazing/no_mgmt.

branches.condition: pft_type=="grass" -> harvest grass management term in turnover
branches.else_behavior: option2_harvest_other: no management term for other pft
branches.notes: True: harvest grass. False: harvest oat.

branches.condition: pft_type!="grass" -> no harvest management term in turnover
branches.else_behavior: option2_harvest_grass: apply harvest grass management term
branches.notes: True: harvest oat. False: harvest grass.

branches.condition: management_type==3 -> grazing management term in turnover_cleaf
branches.else_behavior: option2_no_mgmt or option2_organic: no grazing term
branches.notes: True: option2 grazing grass/oat. False: option2 harvest/no_mgmt.

branches.condition: pft_type=="grass" -> grazing grass management term in turnover
branches.else_behavior: option2_grazing_other: no management term for other pft
branches.notes: True: grazing grass. False: grazing oat.

branches.condition: pft_type!="grass" -> no grazing management term in turnover
branches.else_behavior: option2_grazing_grass: apply grazing grass management term
branches.notes: True: grazing oat. False: grazing grass.

branches.condition: management_type not 1 or 3 -> no management term in turnover_cleaf
branches.else_behavior: harvest or grazing management term applied
branches.notes: True: no-mgmt and low-cleaf cases. False: harvest/grazing cases.

branches.condition: cleaf <= 0.00001 -> turnover_cleaf set to 0
branches.notes: True: low-cleaf threshold case. False: normal cleaf cases. Paired with option2_cleaf_above.
